a,z in ipairs({{-283555+283556,47817+-47332},{436030+-436029;-489992-(-490336)};{926006-925661,617626-617141}})do while z[878638+-878637]<z[353832+-353830]do M[z[976963-976962]],M[z[-904429-(-904431)]],z[-552904-(-552905)],z[-206739+206741]=M[z[705736+-705734]],M[z[263982-263981]],z[-224372+224373]+(-309740-(-309741)),z[-954168-(-954170)]-(-846981+846982)end end local function a(a)return M[a-(-991722-(-1005342))]end do local a=type local z=string.char local S=table.insert local K=M local A=table.concat local x=string.len local N=math.floor local 4633258-841912 end return z else return A({},{[a(-631682-(-645331))]=s,[a(106945-93094)]=M;[a(-468156-(-482075))]=function()return 4697421-906075 end})end end,function(M,a)local S=I(a)local
